payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped light brown wooden cabinet door showing vertical wood grain and a faint horizontal handle/trim near the upper area; smooth veneer finish with slight shadowing along the side, appears to be a lower cabinet panel and is close to the camera (approx. 0.8 m).
